mapper.select: SELECT tsc.*, tdt.std_eq_nm, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tsci.write_year IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(tsci.write_year, tsci.doc_no, tsci.doc_type, tsci.doc_seq) END) AS item_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tscd.write_year IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(tscd.doc_no, tscd.doc_type , tscd.doc_seq) END) AS list_cnt FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist tsc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_dataset_typeofequipment tdt ON tdt.std_eq_id = tsc.std_eq_id AND tdt.comp_id = tsc.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist_item tsci ON tsci.write_year = tsc.write_year AND tsci.doc_no = tsc.doc_no AND tsci.doc_type = tsc.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist_detail tscd ON tscd.write_year = tsc.write_year AND tscd.doc_no = tsc.doc_no AND tscd.doc_type = tsc.doc_type WHERE 1 = 1 AND tsc.comp_id = #{compId} GROUP BY tsc.write_year, tsc.doc_type, tsc.doc_no, tsc.comp_id, tsc.std_eq_id, tsc.title, tsc.use_yn,tsc.created_at,tsc.created_by,tsc.updated_at,tsc.updated_by, tdt.std_eq_nm ORDER BY tsc.use_yn DESC,tsc.ord_seq ASC, tsc.doc_no DESC

SELECT tscd.*, tsc.check_item, tsc.use_yn as item_use_yn, tsc.ord_seq as item_ord_seq FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist_detail tscd left join esg.tb_safety_checklist_item tsc on tsc.write_year = tscd.write_year and tsc.doc_type = tscd.doc_type and tsc.doc_no = tscd.doc_no and tsc.doc_seq = tscd.check_item_seq WHERE 1 = 1 AND tscd.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tscd.doc_no = #{docNo} AND tscd.doc_type = #{docType} ORDER BY tsc.use_yn desc, tscd.use_yn desc, tsc.ord_seq, tsc.check_item, tscd.ord_seq

select t1.created_at , t2.minor_nm as inspectionCycleNm , t3.hr_nm from esg.tb_safety_checklist_history t1 left join esg.tb_common_d t2 on t2.major_cd = 'C0046' and t1.inspection_cycle = t2.minor_cd left join esg.tb_hr_info t3 on t1.created_by = t3.user_id where t1.std_eq_id = #{searchText} and t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} order by t1.created_at desc
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_checklist ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, std_eq_id, title, inspection_cycle, use_yn, created_at, created_by, ord_seq ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{stdEqId}, #{title}, #{inspectionCycle}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{ordSeq} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist_item WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_checklist_item ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, check_item, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{checkItem}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_checklist_detail ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, check_item_seq, check_list, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{checkItemSeq}, #{checkList}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT tei.equipment_id, tei.equipment_nm, tsch.hr_id as id, thi.hr_nm as nm, tei.std_eq_id, thi.user_id, tui.clnt_id FROM esg.tb_equipment_info tei LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist_hr tsch ON tsch.equipment_id = tei.equipment_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.hr_id = tsch.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info tui ON thi.user_id = tui.user_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND tei.std_eq_id = #{searchText} AND tei.use_yn = 'Y' AND tei.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY thi.ord_seq

SELECT tei.equipment_id, tei.equipment_nm, thimH.hr_id as id, hrH.hr_nm as nm FROM esg.tb_equipment_info tei LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thimH ON thimH.target_id = tei.equipment_id AND thimH.target_type = 'equipment' AND thimH.gubun = 'HEAD' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hrH ON hrH.hr_id = thimH.hr_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND tei.std_eq_id = #{searchText} AND tei.use_yn = 'Y' AND tei.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY hrH.ord_seq
SELECT tsch.equipment_id as extra1, tsch.hr_id as id FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist_hr tsch WHERE 1 = 1 AND tsch.equipment_id = #{equipmentId}
